evidence.description: CRIT-300 (lines 21-25) maps to REQ-FEED-030.1 in behavioral-spec.md:1305-1356 with the 5-row truth table (cell 1 effectiveMount=true / EC-FEED-024 row / cell 2 / cell 3 / cell 4). PROP-FEED-S6-001 in verification-architecture.md:801 enumerates the same 5 rows. Mapping verified. Iter-1 FIND-002 fix (scope frontmatter line 9 enumerates PROP-FEED-S6-001..007 + EC-FEED-021..024) verified. Iter-1 FIND-005 fix (EC-FEED-021 deferral note in scope and calibration line 87) verified.
REQ-FEED-030.1 (line 1305-1356) and REQ-FEED-034.1/2 (line 1358-1416) match CRIT-300/CRIT-302 references. PROP-FEED-S6-001..007 in verification-architecture.md:797-807 cover all listed REQs.

CRIT-302 (lines 31-35) is now restricted to behavioral assertions (S6-004/005/006 click routing). Iter-1 FIND-001 (PROP-FEED-S6-001 double-counting) verified resolved: CRIT-300 owns structural truth table; CRIT-302 owns click-routing behavioral observations. Iter-1 FIND-004 (RED→GREEN process evidence relocated to evidence/sprint-6-{red,green}-phase.log) verified — line 35 explicitly delegates process evidence to log files outside the criterion grading.

Iter-1 FIND-008 (CRIT-303 git diff path) verified: line 40 uses explicit `promptnotes/src-tauri/src/editor.rs promptnotes/src-tauri/src/feed.rs` with no brace expansion. Iter-1 FIND-003 (CRIT-304 explicit grep allowlist) verified: line 45 contains a fully specified `git diff main..HEAD --name-only | grep -vE ...` shell command. The CRIT-304 allowlist enumerates production change (FeedRow.svelte), VCSDD artifacts, 3 new test files, 2 existing test edits, 2 config files. PROP-FEED-S5-013 baseline tag check is preserved via `vcsdd/ui-feed-list-actions/sprint-4-baseline`.

Iter-1 FIND-006 (CRIT-300 grep -E ERE) verified at line 25 (unescaped `|` ERE form). Iter-1 FIND-007 (CRIT-303 vitest count `≥ 240` disambiguation) verified at line 40. Iter-1 FIND-009 (CRIT-301 stratification per-cell counter) verified at line 30 — the counter mechanism is now described, although the matcher syntax used has a separate defect (FIND-S6-CONTRACT-iter2-003). Iter-1 FIND-010 (calibration S6-007 orthogonality) verified at line 86 of contract.
